_comment: Single source of truth for Federal Reserve Beige Book release dates. Read by the dedicated Beige Book scoring trigger, which acts only on a release date (date in 'releases'). The Beige Book is published 8x/year about two weeks before each FOMC meeting at 2:00pm ET. The release WEEKDAY varies - usually Wednesday, but e.g. 2026-01-14 was a Tuesday - so never assume a weekday; use these exact dates. Refresh this file each year from the official release schedule on the source page.
